---
title: "AI_Basics_and_Use_Cases_Module_1"
format: pptx
---

## Artificial Intelligence (AI) - The Basics and Use Cases

- Module 1: AIM (AI for MSME Advancement) Training

## Learning Objectives

- Understand AI Fundamentals
- Distinguish AI Types
- Articulate Business Value
- Identify Functional Use Cases
- Evaluate Business Opportunities

## Understanding AI Fundamentals

- Definition: The simulation of human intelligence through machines.
- Key Requirements:
- - Good Quality Data (the \"fuel\")
- - Selection of Algorithms
- - Structured Output

## Distinguishing AI Types (The AI Landscape)

- Machine Learning (ML): Learning from data without explicit programming (e.g., Recommendation engines, Fraud detection)
- Deep Learning (DL): Using neural networks for complex patterns (e.g., Image recognition)
- Natural Language Processing (NLP): Understanding/generating human language (e.g., Chatbots, Translation)
- Computer Vision (CV): Interpreting visual information (e.g., Facial recognition, Quality control)
- Generative AI (GenAI): Creating new content (e.g., Content creation, Design)

## Articulating Business Value

- Increased Efficiency: Automating repetitive tasks
- Improved Decision-Making: Data-driven insights
- Enhanced Customer Experience: 24/7 support
- Personalization: Tailoring services to individual needs
- Gaining a Competitive Edge: Staying ahead in the market

## Identifying Functional Use Cases

- Customer Service: Chatbots, automated inquiry handling
- Marketing: Personalized messages, content creation, design
- Operations: Quality control (CV), supply chain optimization
- Finance: Fraud detection, automated financial reporting
- Human Resources: Candidate screening, personalized learning

## Evaluating Business Opportunities (The Roadmap)

- Identify Value Areas: Find functions where AI can generate value.
- Assess Feasibility: Check for necessary data and $infrastructure.
- Start Small: Focus on high-impact, specific use cases before scaling.

## Summary

- Recap of AI Fundamentals
- Overview of AI Types (ML, DL, NLP, CV, GenAI)
- Value Proposition for MSMEs
- Functional Use Case Identification
- Framework for Evaluating Opportunities
